ai_summary: AIROLAM Limited has appointed M/s Ashish Sheth & Associates as its new statutory auditor, effective July 21, 2026, to fill a casual vacancy. This change was prompted by the unexplained resignation of the previous auditor, M/s. Piyush J. Shah & Co., which is a significant red flag requiring further inquiry into the reasons for their departure. While the new firm appears well-qualified, this temporary appointment underscores an abrupt shift in the company's financial oversight.
